verdict_reasoning: LYN is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner (cytoplasmic) leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. It functions exclusively at the cytoplasmic face of the PM and intracellular membranes. No transmembrane domain, no GPI anchor, no documented outer-leaflet exposure. All cell biology confirms inner-leaflet-only localization. No evidence of cell-state-induced ecto-display, tissue-restricted surface display, lysosomal-exocytosis, dual-localization with outer-leaflet pool, or stable surface-partner tethering.
